title: Fresh Fluffy Jamaican Baby Aubergine Skewers
description: A low-carb, flavorful Jamaican dish featuring baby aubergine, perfect for adventurous eaters. This recipe combines the natural sweetness of aubergine with the bold spices of Jamaica.
instructions: Preheat grill to medium-high heat, about 400°F (200°C).
In a blender or food processor, combine scotch bonnet pepper, garlic, ginger, thyme, allspice, salt, and black pepper. Blend until well combined.
Brush the baby aubergine with coconut oil and season with the blended spice mixture.
Thread 3 baby aubergine onto each skewer, leaving a small space between each.
Grill the skewers for 10-12 minutes, turning occasionally, until the aubergine is tender and lightly charred.
Brush the skewers with lemon juice during the last 2 minutes of grilling.
Serve the skewers hot, garnished with additional thyme if desired.
Let the skewers rest for 2-3 minutes before serving.
Serve with your favorite Jamaican sides, such as grilled pineapple or coconut rice.
Enjoy your delicious and flavorful Fresh Fluffy Jamaican Baby Aubergine Skewers!
